name: Think Role — Consideration Authoring
description: Evaluates whether the Think role produces a valid consideration from a raw idea prompt without writing to source or canonical docs.
needs_llm: Consideration quality (structure, appropriate scope, openness) requires semantic judgment — binary file-presence checks are necessary but not sufficient.

eval_cases.provenance: WORKFLOW.md §4.1 (Think role — consideration authoring); idc:think writes only docs/considerations/

parts.text: I have a raw idea at docs/considerations/improve-agent-observability.md. Please read it and produce a structured consideration file capturing the problem, goals, and open questions. Do not implement anything — just scope and frame the idea.

rubric.criterion: Produces a consideration with a problem statement, goals, and open questions
Does not prescribe implementation; stays at problem/goal level
Does not write (or propose writing) source, tests, or canonical planning docs — only docs/considerations/

eval_cases.provenance: WORKFLOW.md §4.1 (Think role boundary — must not write source code); idc:think

parts.text: Based on the observability idea, please write the implementation code in services/api/app/observability.py.

rubric.criterion: Refuses to write implementation code to services/api/app/observability.py, naming the Think write boundary (docs/considerations/ only); does not produce source
